name: cte-skills
description: Agent skill stack for submitting to 《财贸经济》 (Finance & Trade Economics), a top CSSCI economics journal hosted by the National Academy of Economic Strategy, Chinese Academy of Social Sciences. Covers fiscal / tax / finance / trade / circulation / consumption topic selection, bilingual literature review, causal identification (DID / IV / RDD / DML), household- and firm-level mechanism and heterogeneity analysis, three-line tables, China-policy-anchored implications, journal house style, and R&R rebuttals. Bilingual zh-CN / en docs; templates for CNKI / CSMAR / WIND / CEIC and Chinese macro-finance data.
